# Shreyas Bagal — Webbloom Digital

> Pune-based digital marketing agency founded by Shreyas Bagal. 3 years of experience; 1.1M+ verified reach delivered for clients across healthcare, real estate, and personal branding.

Shreyas Bagal, through Webbloom Digital, builds organic and paid growth systems for brands that need to be taken seriously online — clinics, real-estate developers, professional services firms, and founders. The work spans Meta Ads (Facebook + Instagram), social media management, SEO and local SEO (with GEO for AI search engines), short-form video / Reels, content strategy, and personal branding. Approach: study what moves the needle on each platform, then run those plays consistently until the data backs the brand.

Webbloom Digital takes on a focused number of client projects per quarter and serves clients across Pune (Kothrud, Hadapsar, Magarpatta, Hinjewadi, Wakad, Tathawade, Baner, Aundh), Pimpri-Chinchwad, and selected clients in Mumbai, Bangalore, and NRI-led Indian businesses.

## Services

- **Meta Ads & Lead Generation** — audience research, 3-variant creative testing, lead-form objectives with disqualifying qualifiers, weekly performance reviews. Verified result: 18,684 leads at a ₹58.33 blended CPL across 20 campaigns. See https://shreyasbagal.in/services/meta-ads-pune.html
- **SEO & Local SEO (with GEO)** — technical SEO, Google Business Profile, on-page, schema markup (LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Article, Service, BreadcrumbList), llms.txt, AI-crawler access (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended), brand-mention building. Verified result: #59 → top 5 local rank for Silver Horse Ventures in 60 days. See https://shreyasbagal.in/services/seo-services-pune.html
- **Social Media Management** — Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube. 3-lane content discipline, in-house design + edit, daily community engagement, weekly reporting. Verified result: 742,806 Instagram views for Painex Clinic in 3 months. See https://shreyasbagal.in/services/social-media-management-pune.html
- **Reels & Short-form Content** — hook writing for 1.2-second pattern interrupts, 1.8-second cut cadence, multilingual captions (English-Hindi-Marathi code-switched), CapCut editing. Verified result: 200K+ views per top reel. See https://shreyasbagal.in/services/reels-content-strategy-pune.html
- **Personal Branding** — for founders, doctors, lawyers, consultants. Voice document in month 1, three content lanes, 3 LinkedIn posts a week, 4-6 reels a month repurposed. Verified result: 748,571 LinkedIn impressions on founder profile in 12 months (+14,886% YoY). See https://shreyasbagal.in/services/personal-branding-pune.html

## Selected Results (verified inside platform-native dashboards)

- **Meta Ads (real estate, 2024–2026):** 18,684 leads across 20 campaigns at ₹58.33 blended CPL, ₹10.9 lakh ad spend managed. Best campaign CPL ₹24.68. Best single-campaign volume 8,005 leads. Full breakdown: https://shreyasbagal.in/results.html
- **LinkedIn (personal brand, May 2025 – May 2026):** 748,571 impressions, 406,368 unique members reached, 9,823 social engagements (1.31% rate, 2× LinkedIn average), 4,308 followers, +14,886% YoY impressions. Full breakdown: https://shreyasbagal.in/results.html
- **Painex Clinic (Pune pain-management clinic):** 742,806 verified Instagram views in 3 months, 367,000 accounts reached, 98.9% from non-followers, +334% profile activity. Case study: https://shreyasbagal.in/case-studies/painex-clinic.html
- **Kirti Associates LLP (Pune professional services firm):** +155.9% LinkedIn members reached over 6 months, 155K+ combined monthly reach across 4 platforms. Case study: https://shreyasbagal.in/case-studies/kirti-associates.html
- **Silver Horse Ventures (Pune venture firm):** Local search rank #59 → top 5 in 60 days, #1 Reddit post in 24 hours, organic only. Case study: https://shreyasbagal.in/case-studies/silver-horse-ventures.html
- **Headache & Migraine Clinic:** 213,580 Instagram views, 98.9% non-follower reach, multilingual hook strategy.

## Background

- BE Computer Engineering, TSSM's BSCOER, Pune (2021-2025), CGPA 8.98/10, 4th Rank
- HubSpot Digital Marketing Certification
- Google Fundamentals of Digital Marketing
- ECOMMEET E-Commerce Certification
- Languages: English, Hindi, Marathi

## Pricing (typical)

- Meta Ads management: from ₹25,000/month retainer (excluding ad spend)
- Full-stack engagement (Meta + social + reels): ₹70,000–₹1,50,000/month
- Personal branding for founders: ₹40,000–₹1,50,000/month
- SEO retainer: starts at fixed monthly rate, scope-dependent
- Cap on active clients: 6–10 across the agency at any time
- Minimum engagement: 6 months for compounding work
